samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="edge_detect">
    <description>Edge detector for detecting rising and falling edges of input signal a.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="a">Input signal.</input>
        <output id="rise">Output signal indicating a rising edge.</output>
        <output id="down">Output signal indicating a falling edge.</output>
    </ports>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="prev_a" type="d_ff" clock="clk" reset="rst_n" reset_value="0">Previous value of input signal a.</register>
        <wire id="rise_next">Next value of rise output signal.</wire>
        <wire id="down_next">Next value of down output signal.</wire>
        <assign rise_next = (prev_a == 1'b0 && a == 1'b1) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;>Set rise to 1 if previous a was 0 and current a is 1.</assign>
        <assign down_next = (prev_a == 1'b1 && a == 1'b0) ? 1'b1 : 1'b0;>Set down to 1 if previous a was 1 and current a is 0.</assign>
        <always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n)>
            if (!rst_n) begin
                prev_a <= 1'b0;
                rise <= 1'b0;
                down <= 1'b0;
            end else begin
                prev_a <= a;
                rise <= rise_next;
                down <= down_next;
            end
        end
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>Sequential logic to detect rising and falling edges of input signal a.</implementation>
</module>
```
